programme.title: Van Halen
programme.desc: VAN HALEN achieved worldwide fame for their many popular songs and larger-than-life stage performances they also became known for the drama surrounding the departures of former members. Controversy surrounded the band following the exits of Roth, Hagar, and Anthony this controversy often included numerous conflicting press statements between the former members and the band. In 2007, Van Halen was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. VH1 ranked them 7th on their list of the top 100 hard rock artists of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Various Artists

programme.title: Meat Loaf
programme.desc: American musician and actor is noted for the Bat Out of Hell trilogy of albums, consisting of Bat Out of Hell, Bat Out of Hell II: Back into Hell, and Bat Out of Hell III: The Monster is Loose. Bat Out of Hell has sold more than 43 million copies worldwide. Almost 40 years after its release, it still sells an estimated 200,000 copies annually, and stayed on the charts for over nine years, making it one of the best selling albums of all time. He is one of the best-selling music artists of all time, with worldwide sales of more than 80 million records. He has also appeared in over 50 movies and television shows, sometimes as himself or as characters resembling his stage persona. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic artist.

programme.title: Elena Bashkirova, Baiba Skride, Itamar Zorman & Krzysztof Chorzelski
programme.desc: During late summer every year, some of the world's best musicians meet in Israel for the Jerusalem International Chamber Music Festival (JCMF), established by pianist Elena Bashkirova and Yeheskell Beinisch. In 2016, the 19th festival was dedicated to the music of interrelated composers, such as Brahms and Schumann, and Schubert and Beethoven – performed by outstanding artists such as Sir András Schiff, Baiba Skride, Menahem Pressler and Emmanuel Pahud in the halls of the Jerusalem YMCA. This documentary film features excerpts from performances of the following works: Johannes Brahms's String Sextet no. 1, Op. 18 Franz Schubert's Arpeggione Sonata in A minor, D. 821 Antonín Dvořák's Piano Quintet no. 2 in A major, Op. 81 Ferruccio Busoni's Fantasia Contrappuntistica Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio no. 1, Op. 49 and Ludwig van Beethoven's Quintet for Piano and Winds, Op. 16.

programme.title: Gewandhausorchester Leipzig, Andris Nelsons & Kristine Opolais
programme.desc: Andris Nelsons, together with his then-wife, the great soprano Kristine Opolais and the Gewandhausorchester Leipzig present a program dedicated to Antonin Dvořák, singing the melodies that the composer hid in all layers of his music with tender, warm, soft colors. Nelsons' tempos remain calm and relaxed, allowing the omnipresent beauty of Dvořák's music to unfold and flood the Gewandhaus. The program opens with Othello, a Concert Overture for Orchestra, Op. 93. Opolais performs “Song to the Moon” from Rusalka, “Songs my Mother Taught Me” from Gypsy Songs, Op. 55/4. This is followed by the Polonaise and 'O, marno, marno to je' from Rusalka and 'Dobrá! Já mu je dám!... Jak je mi?' from Smetana's opera Dalibor. The concert closes with a performance of Dvořák's Symphony no. 9 in E Minor, Op. 95 (“From the New World”). Recorded at the Gewandhaus, Leipzig in May 2017.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Herbert Blomstedt & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Piano Concerto No. 1 & Symphony No. 2
programme.desc: At the age of seven, Argentine pianist Martha Argerich made her debut with Ludwig van Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 1 in C major, Op. 15, a piece that would accompany her throughout her career. The celebrated pianist performs this signature piece at the Lucerne Festival with the Lucerne Festival Orchestra under the baton of Swedish conductor Herbert Blomstedt, who makes his festival debut with the orchestra. Beethoven's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 36, is also on the program. This performance was recorded at the Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland, in August 2020.

programme.title: Russian National Orchestra & Mikhail Pletnev
programme.desc: Russian conductor and pianist Mikhail Pletnev leads the Russian National Orchestra in performances of Nikolai Rimsky-Korsakov's music. On the program are Suite for Orchestra after the opera 'The Legend of the Invisible City of Kitezh and the Maiden Fevroniya', and Musical Pictures for Orchestra from the opera 'The Tale of Tsar Saltan'. Part of the latter is the famous 'Flight of the Bumblebee'. This concert was recorded at the Tchaikovsky Concert Hall of the Russian Philharmonic Society in 2017.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98. Brahms completed his last symphony in 1885. He conducted the successful premiere of the piece in the German city of Meiningen in October of the same year. The symphony's finale movement is a chaconne, a variation form that reflects the composer's fascination with Baroque music. In this movement, Brahms borrowed an 8-measure theme from J. S. Bach's cantata ‘Nach dir, Herr, verlanget mich', BWV 150. The movement opens with the theme and then presents a set of variations all set over the same repeated theme in the bass. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2014.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucas siente culpa tras asesinar a Prudencia. Mientras, Verónica reacciona con absoluta frialdad ante la noticia de su muerte. Ricardo consuela a Patricia por la pérdida de su mamá y la besa.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Guerra siente que Verónica está interesada en su hijo. La desaparición de Gertrudis pone a los lobos nerviosos. La psiquiatra va a la casa de Dantés. Ramón siente culpa por la muerte del Tigre.

programme.title: Rosa diamante: El turno de Margaret

programme.title: Pasión prohibida

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Bianca decide celebrar su cumpleaños sin la presencia de su madre. Flavia se siente muy mal por la desconfianza de sus hijas, intenta quitarse la vida, y Deniz la lleva al hospital.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Bruno prepara su maleta para irse de la casa, su amor imposible le pide que se quede porque, aunque huya, no podrá borrar lo que siente. Bianca le reclama a Deniz por ocultar información.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Los enamorados comparten el mayor tiempo posible, saben que el idilio no será duradero. Nina le confiesa a su padre que preferiría que él se hubiera casado con Deniz y no con Bianca.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Los celos invaden a Bianca, trata de demostrarle a Ariel que Deniz está enamorada de él, revisa entre las cosas de la empleada, pero no halla la carta comprometedora. Eliana desconfía de Bruno.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Bruno entra a la habitación de Bianca cuando ella se está bañando y disfruta al verla, Penélope llega inesperadamente y casi los sorprende. Guillermo busca cómo chantajear a Flavia.

programme.title: Secretos de Villanas

programme.title: El Secreto de Feriha
programme.desc: El Secreto de Feriha - Mi Todo: La madre de Emir comienza a investigar a Feriha y su relación con Emir.

programme.title: El Secreto de Feriha
programme.desc: El Secreto de Feriha - Visita Inesperada: Al entrar a su casa, Feriha se encuentra con la madre de Emir, quien la confronta por sus mentiras.

programme.title: El Secreto de Feriha
programme.desc: El Secreto de Feriha - Oferta Laboral: A Zehra le ofrecen un nuevo trabajo. Feriha y Emir dan un romántico paseo a caballo.

programme.title: Volver a Amar
programme.desc: Volver a Amar - Osman "El Pelirrojo": Haydar y Fatih encuentran una pista que les puede llevar hasta Zeynep. Mientras tanto, Meryem decide entrar en acción para rescatar a su hija.

programme.title: Volver a Amar
programme.desc: Volver a Amar - Sin Veneno No Hay Antídoto: Si no encuentran el veneno que tiene Zeynep, el antídoto no llegará a tiempo. En previsión de un desenlace fatídico, Zeynep solicita ver a su hijo.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Errores Que Pueden Costar Caro: En un intento de salvar a su familia, Rüveyda delata la ubicación de Zuhré y con ello la de toda su familia.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Puerta Azul: Rüveyda no se encuentra feliz con la casa donde van a vivir. Mientras tanto en la familia Karakaya sale a la luz un secreto familiar.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Siento Que Me Perteneces: En medio de la noche, sin dinero y sin auto, Zeyit busca un hospital. En el camino se encuentran con una mujer que los ayuda.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Amenaza: Asu Des amenaza a Munir. Selim le habla a Meltem y se hace una promesa a si mismo. Mukaddes ruega volver a la familia. Meltem llama llorando a Mustafá.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Control: Kerim no es el único que vuelve al lugar donde ocurrieron los hechos esa fatídica noche. Fatmagül y su familia se cambian de casa. Selim y Meltem se encuentran y el hijo de Rafad pierde el control.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Visita en la Cárcel: Mukaddes sigue intentando que la acepten. Asu Des vuelve a Estambul y ve a Sami. Kadir le avisa a Fatmagül que por fin podrá visitar a Kerim en la cárcel.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Encuentro: Fatmagül y Kerim por fin se ven y se entregan cartas. Asu se está quedando con Mustafá y recibe la visita de Meltem. Mustafá tiene miedo de que descubran lo que hizo.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Alegría: Mukaddes extraña demasiado a Murat. Kadir y Eve Nine pasan un tiempo solos hablando de su pasado. Fatmagül por fin baja la guardia ante Kerim y se permite disfrutar el momento.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Denuncia: Fatmagül intenta poner una denuncia en contra de Mustafá. Mukaddes se da cuenta de algo que cambiará su futuro de por vida. Los Yaşaran cada vez tienen más problemas.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Presión: Mustafá va a hablar con Turaner Alagöz y le dice lo que escuchó. Munir intenta presionar a Asu Des. Mukaddes va a ver a Murat. Kerim hace algo que podría afectar el caso.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Sorpresa: Kerim le adelanta su sorpresa de cumpleaños a Fatmagül. Meltem va a despedirse de Mustafá. Rasad se da cuenta de que su plan para hundir a Turaner no funcionará.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa le dice a Paulo que le duele verlo con Aída. Armando le dice a Teresa que Mariano usó el anillo de compromiso para ayudarlo a pagar una deuda. Paulo decide terminar su relación con Aída.

programme.title: Rubí: Falso amor
programme.desc: La reina de España le dice a Rubí que no permitirá que forme parte de la realeza y ella, molesta, le dice a la prensa cosas terribles sobre Eduardo y su familia. Rubí descubre que no recibirá nada de la herencia de Héctor.

programme.title: Amor real: Dificil peticion
programme.desc: José María, molesto, le dice a Josefina que su boda con Humberto fue una farsa. Manuel le pide a Adolfo que vaya a ver al papá de Matilde para ofrecerle ayuda económica en su nombre.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Gran encuentro
programme.desc: Don Alejandro conoce a Maricruz y empieza a interrogarla, Octavio busca a Maricruz en la pensión pues se entera que ahora vive ahí.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro: Volví por ti
programme.desc: Fina y Roberta hablan del embarazo y acuerdan hacerse un legrado. Benjamín busca a Renata, le dice que volvió por ella. Antonio le da un anillo a Regina y le pide que hagan un compromiso de vida. Fina se entera que Roberta tiene problemas cardíacos.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Revelaciones
programme.desc: Constancio salva a Mili de ser abusada por Damián. Luciana descubre que Constancio tiene un hijo perdido y que tuvo una relación con Andrea. El pandroso se pelea con Alejandro frente a Mili y descubren que es Hugo.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Búsqueda
programme.desc: Sofía cura las heridas que un delincuente le hizo a Juan. Óscar y Franco realizan una búsqueda para poder encontrar a Juan.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Un paso adelante
programme.desc: Aarón designa a Gaviota como su nueva secretaria. Rodrigo está a punto de tener intimidad con Isadora creyendo que es Gaviota. Isadora, cansada del desprecio de Rodrigo, decide dejarlo.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Mariano le dice a Teresa que seguirá estudiando y trabajando. Genoveva cree que Rubén tiene una relación con Teresa, pero él lo niega.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Don Fernando decide darle a Soraya solo una pequeña cantidad mensual para mantenerse. María intenta convencer a Luis Fernando de trabajar en la empresa de su padre. Soraya siente celos al ver que Luis Fernando pasa tiempo con María.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Luis Fernando regresa del casino y le muestra a María que no se gastó el dinero de su padre y le dice cosas bonitas para volver a enamorarla. Fernando sufre un ataque al corazón al saber que Luis Fernando tiene deudas de juego.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: María Mercedes le dice a Jorge Luis que está esperando un hijo suyo. Jorge Luis se cae de las escaleras y se lastima el pie.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina tiene un nuevo plan para perjudicar a Maria Mercedes Jorge Luis le dice a María Mercedes que huya o será él quien se vaya de su lado.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Natalia visita a Rodolfo San Genis para pedirle que retire la invitación de su recepción a Bella Renato es contratado por Bernardo para trabajar en el club.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Bella llega a la fiesta de San Genis, él trata de llevársela a la fuerza, pero Sergio llega justo a tiempo y la defiende de Rodolfo San Genis.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María avisa en casa que Fernando está en el hospital. Luis Fernando busca al dueño del casino, le reclama por cobrarle a su padre, el dueño saca un arma y le dispara.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Soraya acusa de ladrona a María, Carlota apoya la mentira diciendo que la vió salir del cuarto de Soraya. Carlota y Soraya revisan la habitación de María y encuentran la cartera que Soraya puso ahí.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: María Mercedes le dice a Jorge Luis que está esperando un hijo suyo. Jorge Luis se cae de las escaleras y se lastima el pie.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula siente celos al ver que Cynthia no se separa de Gustavo. Macaria se molesta al saber que Ulises piensa ayudar a Consuelo en sus estudios. Rogelio entristece al enterarse de que no podrá adoptar a Margarito.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Cynthia idea un nuevo plan para deshacerse de Ana Paula. Vanesa le hace creer a Rogelio que le interesa encontrar a Margarito solo para poder acercarse a él. Ana Paula le confiesa a Rogelio que el hijo que espera es de Gustavo.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Violeta entristece al saber que su operación no fue exitosa. Alejandro prepara todo para casarse cuanto antes con Antonia. Candela enfrenta a Violeta para confesarle que José María no la ama.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Pablo y Lía se ponen de novios. Violeta se pone celosa al encontrar a Candela en casa de José Maria. Justino amenaza a Antonia con matar a Alejandro si sigue con la idea de casarse con él. Max trata de besar a Violeta a la fuerza.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Justino va a buscar al hotel al doctor Alejandro para impedir que se case con Antonia y lo avienta desde el balcón. El padre Basilio es testigo de la muerte de Alejandro y culpa a Justino. Mariela busca la forma de que Max pague por su infidelidad.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Mariela y Malena se enteran de que la policía busca a Justino porque fue acusado de abuso. José María está confundido por las intrigas de Max y le reclama a Violeta que le haya mentido. Pantaleón esconde al único testigo de la muerte de Alejandro.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Gustavo se llena de esperanza al pensar que Ana Paula podría decidir quedarse con él. Vanesa rompe su sociedad con David para evitar que siga arruinando sus tierras. Rogelio lleva a cabo sus planes para adoptar a Margarito.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Próximo juicio
programme.desc: Douglas lleva a cabo sus planes para liberar a Paulina de la cárcel. Estefanía se emociona al saber que su hijo nació sano. Edmundo le da la noticia a Paulina que pronto se llevará a cabo un juicio para saber si queda en libertad.

programme.title: La Gata: Lejos por un tiempo
programme.desc: Inés quiere robar el dinero que se juntó en la kermesse y amenaza a Esmeralda con una pistola. Esmeralda le dice a su familia que decidió internarse en un instituto para su rehabilitación.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Una nueva esperanza
programme.desc: Efraín aconseja a Cynthia que le dé a Gustavo parte se herencia para poder deshacerse de él. Miguel decide dejar de tomar. Ana Paula le confirma a María que sí está embrazada. Rogelio se pone feliz al saber que pronto podría volver a caminar.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Dolor inmenso
programme.desc: Alex enfurece al ver cómo Bruno besa a María José. A Pedro se le rompe el corazón al saber que Sandra está en coma.

programme.title: La desalmada: Dolor de vientre
programme.desc: Ángela advierte a Isabela que no está dispuesta a que ella y Rigoberto la sigan utilizando. Rosalina sufre dolores en el vientre y teme que su bebé pueda estar en peligro. César Franco busca pruebas contra Octavio y recibe un disparo de Carmelo.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Noticia de matrimonio
programme.desc: Carmina se encuentra con Paolo a escondidas para tener intimidad. Florencia desafía a Elisa al decirle que va a casarse con Damián. Kenia le confiesa a Damián que ella ayudó a Florencia con una prueba de embarazo para engañar a Elisa.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Exigencias
programme.desc: Felipe descubre que Rosendo está enamorado de Valentina. Ivana asegura que Gabriela solo viajó al pueblo para estar cerca de Felipe. Benita se alegra al ver que Valentina es ahora una buena mujer.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Todo fue una mentira
programme.desc: Márgara trata de reunir a los héroes y Zacarías regresa a la banda. Hassan secuestra a Prisca. Los héroes se presentan ante los medios y hay reacciones encontradas.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: El Vítor se molesta con Albertano porque salieron tarde para buscar trabajo. Albertano y el Vítor no traen dinero para los tacos en un puesto, por lo que el Huevo y el Bizco los pagan para que trabajen para ellos.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.sub-title: De la calle a la televisión
programme.desc: Albertano les cuenta al Vítor, Rosita y doña Cuca que toda su vida soñó con ser cantautor. Doña Cuca les dice a Albertano y el Vítor que no les dará de desayunar hasta que le paguen todo lo que le deben.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Aldolfo pierde el bono huachicolero por bañarse, y con la ayuda de Jacinta se convierte en hierbero. Carlos recibe regalos de un admirador secreto.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: A Renata le encanta espiar a sus vecinos desde la ventana del dormitorio con el telescopio de Justito para confirmar o desmentir chismes. Justito le da clases de regularización a Victoria.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Por unos estornudos de Placido, la Nena será la enfermera encargada de cuidarlo. Mientras, Gaby se convierte en maquilladora y peinadora.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Doña Chivis aumenta la renta del departamento, y la Nena empieza a vender tartas caseras para poder pagarla. El administrador descubre el agujero que conecta la casa de los López con la del vecino y avisa a la propietaria legítima.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Jane and Ron had a tiny quarter sized water stain on the bedroom ceiling of their six-year-old townhouse. They had a roofing contractor come and repair the balcony above the leak. The contractor ended up having to rip up the existing balcony membrane only to discover the engineered joists below were completely rotted through. The homeowners could not find a contractor willing to take on fixing this structural mess and asked Mike if he was up for the challenge.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Living Room (Vern Yip) + Dining Room (Chenault James)
programme.desc: Vern Yip creates a stunning foyer and a living room that's practically indestructible. Meanwhile, Kentucky designer Chenault James was determined to change that dialogue for our Whole Home Concept House. Her ace in the hole: commissioning her husband, Ed James of Four Boards Woodworking, to craft a shape-shifting table with three distinct uses.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Music Room (Monet Masters of Forbes + Masters) + Back Porch (Barclay Butera)
programme.desc: With the overwhelming task of taking on the music room in Nashville, the capital of live music, Monet Masters jumped right in without hesitation—and soon decided the best way to make a statement was to skip the traditional lounge aesthetic (dark and moody) in favor of a light, bright space with serious flavor. To create this complete outdoor living space, Newport Beach, California, designer Barclay Butera chose coral, white, and blue powder-​coated finishes for the furniture, then layered them with hard-wearing indoor-outdoor fabrics from Kravet in a range of patterns.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Master Bedroom (Jackson Paige) + Kids' Rooms (Amy Berry)
programme.desc: Designer Kristine Paige Kamenstein, of Jackson Paige Interiors, thinks it should be both and focused on this when creating her space within the house. Also, Dallas-​based designer Amy Berry had this in mind when she wrapped the boy's room in a mural of the Virginia countryside, and the girl's in a French blue toile.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Home Office (Dani Arps) + Media Room (Modern Remains)
programme.desc: Danielle Arps, founder of the buzzy firm Dani Arps, is a fan of a minimal aesthetic, and when designing this home office, she imagined it as if she were the client. Lauren Moore of the design trio Modern Remains built a platform in the back of the media room to showcase multiple shelving units that could hold art, books, and collectibles.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.desc: Nashville kitchen and bath designer Richard Anuszkiewicz was determined to take a narrow passageway between the master bedroom and closet and turn it into a retreat. “Everything in this bath is light and bright, so it immediately feels relaxing,” he says. Kitchen-and-bath expert Matthew Quinn starts with what's practical. “I obsess over saving people time—because time equals luxury,” he says. “In this kitchen, I focused on saving steps: from the garage to the fridge, from the dishwasher to the cabinet. It all adds up.”

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.desc: Imagine building your dream space to not only be beautiful, but do draw you in, activate all of your senses, and make you feel happier from the moment you open the door. This was our goal with this home in Nashville.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Perhaps one of the most beautiful and well-organized food market buildings in Europe is the Mercado Central of Valencia. Built on the area where an open-air market stood for centuries, the Valencian style Art Noveau construction is a 'Cathederal of senses'.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Fish Market or Torget (the square) has a charming location in the heart of the city between the fjords and Bergen's seven mountains. On the harbor, the stalls sell an incredible variety of fresh fish and seafood like urchins, scallops, prawns, and lobsters, but also local farm food.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Kapani market is situated just behind the Aristotelous square of the city of Thessaloniki, facing the Aegean Sea. Exploring this market is exploring the city and its history: a tasteful mix of Sephardic, Balkan, Turkish, and Greek delights. All can be found in the intricate streets of the market or tasted at the many cafés and tavernas operating there daily.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The market of San Benedetto in Cagliari is the island's belly. It is one of the biggest fresh produce markets in Europe and arguably said to be the biggest fish market in Europe. A paradise for food lovers, where every stall keeper has a story to tell.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: An enchanting city, Barcelona is brimming with inspirations left by the greatest of artists. But this charming city has another jewel in its crown - La Boqueria food market. Take a journey through the senses with our lively characters and uncover their gastronomic secrets.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The largest indoor market in Budapest is also the most elegant in Europe! Spanning over three levels, the impressive central food market is long recognized as a marvel. Whether it be the freshest fish, the richest goose liver, or the sweetest paprika that you're looking for, you'll find it. But don't forget the basement: this is where you will find the very best pickled cabbage in the country!

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: A natural haven of tasty delights and local delicacies, the Croix Rousse is Lyon's market gem. From goat farms where the region's most delicious cheeses are contrived to bakeries that produce only organic bread. This episode comes with a warning, be prepared to get very hungry indeed!

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: In a city that is still evolving in its identity in the post-Apartheid era, Johannesburg's massive street art scene has caused it to become the cutting edge of modern art in Africa. David spends the day exploring the city with local graffiti artists, learning its history, and sampling its local cuisine. From roadside braai to hipster world markets, the food in Jo'burg proves that the city is at the epicenter of Africa's multifaceted cultural explosion.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: Known for being the home of South African heroes Nelson Mandela and Desmond Tutu, the township of Soweto was, in years past, known as a rough outskirt of Johannesburg. Through the locals and their delicious home-cooked BBQ, David discovers that there's more to Soweto than meets the eye. With a powerful art and dance culture that's full of passion and energy, this tight-knit community is growing into a formidable city of its own.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: With only 12-hours' notice to attend a wedding in Tanzania's capital city, it's a good thing David is in Dar es Salaam, a major hub of fashion, textiles and trade on Africa's East coast. Though he doesn't manage to blend in with the locals at the wedding, he does get to sample the local food available at the Coco beach market, and to take a trip out of the bustling city to an easy-going fishing village to soak up its fresh seafood market. After spending time with a local hotel owner who built hi

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: David speaks with several of the diaspora, Ethiopian-born people who have spent the majority of their lives abroad and have recently moved back to the capital city, Addis Ababa. He realizes that the true spirit of the country, with its reputation for poverty and famine, lies in the younger generations whose entrepreneurial drive and appreciation for preserving their unique culture are paving a new future for a modern Ethiopia.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: In the wake of a 7-year Italian occupation of Addis Ababa, a charming amount of Italian culture intertwines with the modern Ethiopia that the city now represents. David meets up with his friend Fabricio, a proud Italian who spent his childhood in Addis Ababa, and together they explore the remnants of a time long past. From espresso cafes to fine Italian eateries, Ethiopia's capital has many unexpected surprises for Italians and Europeans alike.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Zanzibar, a picturesque island known for its vast white sand beaches and its cultural melting-pot of African and Arabic culture, David is enchanted by the local people and their laid-back way of life. He meets a young business owner who builds houseboats and is gaining success in the tourism industry. Together they have fun cooking fresh local seafood for friends right on the boat. Later, David tours the winding streets and colourful markets of Stone Town with a couple of musici

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: David journeys off the beaten path in Zanzibar to the small fishing village of Jambiani, where the motto is “Pole-Pole” or “Slowly-slowly," and the people are warm and inviting. He spends the day with an Italian hotel owner who loved the island so much she made it her home 8 years ago. During his stay on the island, he witnesses the daily life of the locals, from seaweed harvesting in the vast shallow waters at low-tide, to spear fishing for fresh octopus, to grilling fresh seafood right on the

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: Local Chef and foodie Andrew Draper takes David on a culinary journey through his hometown of Durban, South Africa. From trendy cafes to massive street markets, they get a taste of how the locals eat, with a focus on huge amounts of BBQ'D meats. Part of this food tour takes them up the coast to the beautiful Oyster Box Hotel, where David enjoys champagne to compliment fresh oysters harvested straight from the sea by the hotel manager himself. This culinary tour ends with a party and concert by t

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: Walking tours are all the rage in major metropolitan cities, and Durban is no different. Beset Durban is a free tour group operated by three young professionals, who take David on a private trek through their beloved city. They give David a crash course on some of the city's history, and check out some of the best local hotspots for delicious food. Through them, we learn about a city rich in culture and history, built on the backs of Indian immigrants, which is now currently experiencing an econ

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: Lalibela Ethiopia, seems at first glance like a town lost to time, but with a closer look you can see that the economy is booming and the population is experiencing huge growth which is creating hope for a bright new future. David spends time with some of the locals to get their perspective on this bright future, while he learns how to make a few Ethiopian staples like Shiro, Injera and Berbere, the traditional Ethiopian spice mix that's a must in so many dishes.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa S01 E13
programme.desc: Nestled in the northern foothills of Ethiopia is the remote small town of Lalibela. It's considered one of the holiest places in the world, especially during the all-important Easter week celebrations. David takes in all the rituals and traditions, which date back over 1000 years, as he visits the beautiful monolithic churches, carved directly into the stone. programme.title: Playing with Fire

programme.title: Boys with Toys
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: The Trouble with Tractors
programme.desc: The team's work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences. Sonia and Froy drive to the country to repo a tractor and are forced to confront a group of irate corporate hayriders, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a confused lady who is missing both her car and her sense of decency, and Matt and Sonia get into a Mexican standoff with a wealthy divorcee, his daughter, and her rageaholic boyfriend.

programme.title: Disaster at the Derby
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car, Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when they're forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle.

programme.title: Roll the Dice
programme.desc: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo, Carlos tries to make amends.

programme.title: All In
programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed when Froy brings unwanted trouble back to the office? Also, Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husband's better halves take the reins, Carlos and Sonia repo a limo from an arrogant lotto winner whose luck has run out, and Froy and Lou track down an RV as a side repo for a mom and pop shop, unfortunately the repo goes disastrously wrong when the RV explodes and the fire department has to be called.

programme.title: Mess with Texas
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home. Back in LA, Frankie's wild antics jeopardize a repo and push Lyndah to her breaking point.

programme.title: Super-Sonia
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it. Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor who's got too many cars and too many girlfriends, Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak, and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry.

programme.title: What the Truck?!?
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts a shady import/export warehouse filled with unpaid-for cars, a pair of reckless rodeo gals, and a cunning team of car thieves who don't even think twice before running off with the team's truck.

programme.title: New Truck Day
programme.desc: The repo team's new truck finally arrives, and with it, a new chapter in the building feud between Team Lou and Team Matt.

programme.title: A Blow to the Head
programme.desc: When Froy is seriously injured on a routine repo, the building confrontation between Lou and Matt continues to escalate.

programme.title: Bouquets and Blowtorches
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks. Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work, Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves, and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches. Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business, or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming?

programme.title: The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: Are You Proud?
programme.desc: Are You Proud? is a vivid and engaging docu-celebration of the LGBT rights movement from the partial victory of the 1967 Sexual Offences Act to Stonewall, the Gay Liberation Front, the AIDS crisis, Legal Marriage and finally the 2016 Pulse night club shooting. The film gives an extensive history of the course of LGBT rights campaigning, and shows how much more work there is still to be done. Directed by Ashley Joiner.

programme.title: The Emoji Story

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

Set in the North-eastern portion of this Wilderness Paradise, Saseka Tented Camp is positioned on a distinct curve in the Monwana dry riverbed, which gently sweeps through this incredible landscape. A remarkable setting in the Wild that inspired visionary Designers & Architects, Silvio Rech and Lesley Carstens, to create a Safari Lodge that has a strikingly unique layout and finds a superb balance between cutting-edge design, Classical style and truly feeling connected to the outside environment.

programme.title: Wildlife Wonders of South America
programme.desc: "Wildlife Wonders of South America" begins at sunrise in the Salar De Uyuni, where viewers will enjoy a vibrant array of flamingo and llama scenes from the unique high altitude volcanic salt lakes. From there, we move south down to the Chilean landscapes of San Pedro Atacama to enjoy a miracle of new life and welcoming of an adorable Vicuńa baby. Last but most certainly not least, you'll be gracefully transported to the infamous Torres Del Paine National Park in Patagonia.

programme.title: Flow of Life
programme.desc: Flow of life is a relaxing film full of beautiful images of amazing landscapes. Mountains, Forests, Creeks and Rivers as well as Butterflies, Bees, Bumblebees, lizards and more. Also included are gentle breath reminders to assist in a meditative experience. All scored with relaxing music, composed by Chris Collins.

programme.title: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: Have you ever wanted to just escape everything and teleport yourself to an uncharted, idyllic tropical island paradise and relax there all day? Now you can do just that with this one hour long high definition nature experience which slowly transports the viewer around two different remote islands hidden in the south Pacific. You'll begin at sunrise, far far away from any worries or responsibilities...and as the day progresses you'll slowly make your way from white sandy shorelines to verdant green mountaintops, ending at sunset.

programme.title: Cozy Fireplace
programme.desc: Enjoy the soft glow and sound of dancing flames while snuggling up in the comfort of your home.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E3: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt — A fusion of the diverse artistic styles & visions of our featured artists. Erni Vales unleashes imagination with surreal creations that transport you to another world while Sam Heydt challenges perspectives with thought-provoking conceptual art.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E2: Colors of Mexico — A stunning collection of vibrant artwork for a festive atmosphere, featuring bold and expressive designs that celebrate color and movement.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E3: Oktoberfest — Immerse yourself in the lively spirit of Oktoberfest and the camaraderie of happy hour. With a blend of vivid colors and intricate details, this art collection transports you to bustling beer gardens, traditional attire, and clinking glasses.

programme.title: Happy Hour IV
programme.desc: Happy Hour E4 — This art collection masterfully captures life's vibrancy, alive with the exuberant energy of happy hour. Each piece dances with color and movement complementing the refreshing and illuminative mid-tempo tunes of strings, keys, synth leads, and bass.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E1 — A colorful journey through time and culture, showcasing the diverse talents of artists with Latin American roots. The artwork is accompanied by mid-tempo tunes with influences that stretch across Reggaeton, Flamenco, Baille, Salsa, and Latin Jazz.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Black Artists Now E3 — A transcendent journey celebrating the vibrancy & diversity of black culture. From evocative photographs to vivid canvases, this collection pays homage to the global tapestry of black identity, uniting voices and visions that resonate with the soul.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Women Artists Now E1 — An extraordinary collection amplifying the global brilliance of women creators. showcasing the vibrant and diverse perspectives of women artists worldwide. Each piece reflects the power, innovation, and beauty of women shaping the art landscape.

programme.title: Zen Evenings: Moon Festival in Motion
programme.desc: Zen Evenings: Moon Festival in Motion — A beautiful, artistic tribute to our planet.
